{{Quote|You can do better than this, Ken. Suggestion: Add more detail about moons one and two.|[[HC-100]]|<ref name="TLCotJ">''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]''</ref>}}
'''Yavin 2''' was the second celestial body surrounding the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] apart of the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was classified as a [[Stone/Legends|rocky]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]], with little known about it.

{{Moon-stub}}
